notes: Outcome milestone #16 — Badges live across 3+ pilot gardens; due 2026-06-30.
Epic #466. Groundwork: #457 (feat(greenwill): async badge issuer service).
Hard deadline: Lock + schema deploy 2026-04-25; pilot rollout 2026-06-30.
Portability is a first-class outcome — sibling projects (Coop, WEFA) must render Green Goods badges via the shared EAS schema + Unlock locks without Green Goods-specific integration.

GreenWill broadcast is blocked on a contracts confidence gate: upgrade-preservation unit coverage, GreenWill workflow integration coverage, Arbitrum fork support-flow test (per admin-ui-revamp history, 2026-04-19).
Locks are non-transferable (soulbound); key manager = greenwill issuer address.
No custom badge-issuance contracts — Unlock factory + existing EAS cover the surface.

ui.handoff_note: Badge shelf in client Profile + badge inline in admin WorkReview. Consumes useBadges(address) from shared. Tier formatting (bronze / silver / gold) per modules/badges.ts.

state_api.handoff_note: Greenwill issuer loop + 6 evaluators + unlockClient + easBadgeWriter + cron handler + shared useBadges hook + modules/badges.ts. Idempotent under replay.

contracts.handoff_note: Deploy 6 Unlock locks (non-transferable, key manager = greenwill issuer) via Unlock factory. Register GreenGoodsBadge EAS schema. Persist all addresses + schema UIDs in deployments/{chainId}-latest.json. Close GreenWill contracts confidence gate (upgrade-preservation unit coverage, GreenWill workflow integration coverage, Arbitrum fork support-flow test).

qa_pass_1.handoff_note: Badge display QA via Storybook + Chrome MCP (client + admin); cross-project recognition evidence from Coop or WEFA; i18n validation on badge strings.

qa_pass_2.handoff_note: Re-run issuer idempotency tests; audit non-transferable property on all 6 locks; re-verify GreenWill workflow integration + Arbitrum fork support-flow test; close outcome milestone #16.

history.note: Hub created from superpowers spec + plan. Epic #466; outcome milestone #16; groundwork #457. Decisions locked: Role C (reputation + access gating + portable identity), all 6 Q2 badges, Greenwill as issuance mechanism, shared EAS schema + Unlock locks as portability mechanism.

brief.md + eval.md + status.json scaffolded; spec.md migrated from docs/superpowers/specs/ (legacy folder deleted). plan.todo.md spec link rewired to ./spec.md. GreenWill contracts confidence gate propagated from admin-ui-revamp Phase 0. plan-hub.mjs validate green.
